name: overlay-noop-example
description: Self-contained no-op overlay fixture for the IDT Base + Overlay protocol (DOJ-3707). Demonstrates the discovery contract: a plugin.json declared at <cwd>/.claude-plugin/plugin.json plus a skills/<name>/SKILL.md whose frontmatter declares overlay_target. Used as the external-consumer fixture in Phase 4 validation tests. Does NOT mutate the base draft — returns it unchanged with a single demonstration warning.
